subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath indeed reached the presence of the Wronged One, and We have perused it and apprehended that which thou didst intend in the path of God, the Lord of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک لدی المظلوم و قراناه و اطلعنا بما اردت فی سبیل الله رب العالمین
